text:
There once was a mouse named Mittens. Mittens liked to play in the autumn leaves, and once she found a small pumpkin. It was bright orange, with white stripes down its side. She carried it around for days.

One day Mittens was playing in the yard. She saw the pumpkin sitting at the edge of the sidewalk. She picked it up and let it sway in the cool breeze. Suddenly the wind picked up and the pumpkin flew out the window!

Mittens scampered across the yard and through the garden. She bumped into Mrs. Mouse who screamed.

"Oh no! That pumpkin! My bouquet had a tiny brown spot on it!

"Oh, Mittens. Don't worry. I'll get it for you."

Mrs. Mouse picked up the pumpkin. She cut a big leaf out for a hat and then took a leaf stick figure of a mouse. She painted a big cheeky grin on it.

"I bet that's you!

"You could say...

But I wouldn't
